title: pellaea collina
intro: Pellaea collina, also known as Mountain brake fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pellaea collina include its potential use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Pellaea collina is typically prepared for medicinal use through tea infusions, tinctures, or dried extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
